intro.title: CommunityRule Template
intro.description: These templates can get you started with a proven approach to governance and decision-making. As useful as these templates are, they are not one size fit all solutions though. We recommend that you use them as a starting place for your community to adapt and customize according to your group's specific needs.

errors.loadFailed: We could not load this template. Try again or pick another template from the home page.
errors.applyFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
